textByHash.007e87a39bf1e612ac81be6d79bbb05052da54c2: You need 2 pieces of bark, 2 pieces of fine cloth and 6,000 coins for a splitbark helm.
textByHash.34dee2ca9a84503241d699e8bdcb77d51576880a: I need 1 piece of each for either gloves or boots, 2 pieces of each for a hat, 3 pieces of each for leggings, and 4 pieces of each for a top.
textByHash.3f0c76e47df44d444b5c5b86803aaa772a405bac: Of course I'd happily sell you some at a discounted price if you bring me those items.
textByHash.44b5ed52fa198313cdda1f784639f1cf697ffe83: There you go, enjoy your new armour!
textByHash.47c03e231e979480077d6a07142d7db260746f44: You need 1 piece of bark, 1 piece of fine cloth and 1,000 coins for splitbark boots.
textByHash.59abe2816300ced8b4f9c5ce1ed9782884194aa5: I'm sorry, but I can't do that right now.
textByHash.6030ed66c72f639d09f940b994863e30bb0f5495: I've been studying the practice of making split-bark armour.
textByHash.716e37c9794aedb4fbcab8935df7898da3ab7898: Hello there, can I help you?
textByHash.7200ca41e5598204befb1fe9c2aab27ad59a5605: I need bark from a hollow tree, and some fine cloth. Unfortunately both these items can only be found in Morytania, especially the cloth which is found in the tombs of shades.
textByHash.8550bbdc8bc1d0dce3f5fa5cba7df971309bfdbf: Certainly, what would you like me to make?
textByHash.904a96717c0059a5acd3186a19a507f5adfc006e: It's actually very easy for me to make, but I've been having trouble getting hold of the pieces.
textByHash.92a494cea557bce04a48565dd138da0b829117b7: You need 1 piece of bark, 1 piece of fine cloth and 1,000 coins for splitbark gauntlets.
textByHash.a5e89f07525181d410e174925f885008a2b7bc36: Split-bark armour is special armour for mages. It's much more resistant to physical attacks than normal robes.
textByHash.bc434bb687ba2588ce5b76f71981a152ddd11a2f: I'll charge you 1,000 coins for either gloves or boots, 6,000 coins for a hat, 32,000 coins for leggings, and 37,000 for a top.
textByHash.be8f42653627a7585671a4db257b3abf4e3add5e: You need 3 pieces of bark, 3 pieces of fine cloth and 32,000 coins for splitbark legs.
textByHash.f6233d2eab658d155cae8caf7b4f27e8fb98eeb4: This is split-bark armour, it's special armour for mages. It's much more resistant to physical attacks than normal robes.
textByHash.fa08575a39b669aa760d6b7a22493b6544e7b6c9: You need 4 pieces of bark, 4 pieces of fine cloth and 37,000 coins for a splitbark body.
